name: bookshelf
description: Shared bookshelf with EPUB / PDF / CBZ reader, per-user reading-position sync, and FS-driven catalogue scan. Uses poppler-utils for PDF covers.

envVars.name: BOOKS_ROOT
envVars.description: Host directory containing book files. Bookshelf reads .epub / .pdf / .cbz from here on FS scan.

envVars.name: BOOK_COVERS_DIR
envVars.description: Writable directory where generated PDF covers (PNG, 800px wide) are cached.

requiresContract.description: Asset routes (cover, file) use verifyTokenLoose so plain //

postInstall: 1. Install poppler-utils on the host (apt: poppler-utils; the pdftoppm binary must be on PATH)
2. Run DB migration to create books + book_reading_state
3. Set BOOKS_ROOT and BOOK_COVERS_DIR; mount the former as a host volume
4. Copy the pdfjs worker into public/pdfjs/pdf.worker.min.mjs — pdfjs-dist ships it but bundling via dynamic import is unreliable across Next 14 versions, so the reader expects a local file
5. Optional: POST /api/books/scan as admin to ingest drop-in files on first run
